## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content marketing strategy and budget allocation for Homebase, exploring potential collaborations and addressing challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase faces significant budget constraints and execution bottlenecks, hindering aggressive content marketing growth](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel (fwd.digital) advocates for bolder strategies and larger investments to compete in the rapidly evolving AI-driven market](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Kerry is focusing on high-impact, executable projects while building a framework to demonstrate ROI and secure larger budgets](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Improved reporting and communication between fwd.digital and Homebase are crucial for justifying increased content marketing spend](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Marketing Challenges at Homebase

  - [Limited budget increase for content, with a significant portion allocated to existing partnerships and video production](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Lack of marketing automation and robust ROI tracking systems](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Development bottlenecks: only 20 hours/week of freelance dev time, limiting web page creation to 1 every 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Execution capacity constraints despite having many strategists and ideas](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Strategic Focus for 2025

  - [Hyper-focused approach to enable impact in the new year](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Advocating for removal of development roadblocks](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Pushing for marketing automation implementation](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Building a framework to demonstrate content ROI and secure larger budgets](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Balancing quick-win projects (e.g., programmatic SEO for blog) with longer-term, high-impact initiatives (e.g., glossary development)](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### AI and Market Positioning

  - [Marcel emphasizes the need for Homebase to make bolder moves in light of AI disruption](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Concern that Homebase may fall behind competitors if not aggressively pursuing traffic and content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore AI link building, which has been successful for other clients (e.g., $70,000+ spent on link building by a previous client)](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Collaboration and Reporting

  - [Need for more regular, detailed reporting from fwd.digital to Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Biweekly reviews proposed to build a compelling story for internal stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Marcel offers to advocate directly to John (likely a senior executive at Homebase) for increased content marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Industry Insights and Comparisons

  - [Examples of other companies (e.g., Deep Creme, Reddit) scaling content efforts aggressively](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Discussion of long-term benefits of consistent content investment, even when immediate ROI isn't visible](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kerry to send through new reporting requirements for biweekly reviews](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out to John at Homebase to advocate for more aggressive content marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Schedule a meeting with Katie (likely a senior marketing leader at Homebase) in the new year to present ideas and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Continue discussions on potential expanded scope of work between Homebase and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Kerry to focus on executable projects while building a case for larger investments](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Explore potential collaborations with independent artists for exclusive Homebase merchandise](https://fathom.video/share/4APc1VV_w7SogxnfRqqKsL4_qNBKxTwy?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
